title: A New Job at a Corporate Hall
article_text: I have to switch my old job for a new one. I will acquire new skills at a corporate office. The work is fairly easy, but the hall is made of wood. I must participate in a tough meeting with a representative. I should not tear the important papers. The capacity of the room is fifty people. We will shake hands with our new boss. The company will do a fair assessment of my work. I ought to pay a small fee for the ad. The border guards ignore the regulation, so I can escape.
